bio.name: Kevin Howland
bio.title: Distinguished AI Systems Architect
bio.tagline: Architecting Resilient Intelligence. Nationwide Scale. Zero-Trust Assurance.
bio.summary: High-consequence data architect specializing in bridging the gap between deterministic integrity and modern agentic AI. Expertise in deploying nationwide, zero-trust frameworks for mission-critical systems.

vectors.St: State Space: Multidimensional representation of persistent and ephemeral data nodes.
vectors.Lo: Invariant Control: Logic layer governing state transitions through absolute policy constraints.
vectors.T: Transformer: Engine for data metamorphosis and agentic inference with idempotent validation.
vectors.Ac: Actuator: Zero-trust orchestration layer defining gated I/O and execution telemetry.
vectors.η: Resonance: High-fidelity telemetry and alignment monitoring for real-time drift detection.
